/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/show.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,show.so -o ../lib/show.so CMakeFiles/show.dir/Lorenz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/show.dir/Mandelbrot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/show.dir/Julia.cpp.o CMakeFiles/show.dir/Newton.cpp.o CMakeFiles/show.dir/Ecosys.cpp.o CMakeFiles/show.dir/Henon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/show.dir/May.cpp.o CMakeFiles/show.dir/Trammel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/show.dir/Lsys.cpp.o CMakeFiles/show.dir/Jout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/show.dir/Pfrac.cpp.o  ../libimgui.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so
